children.text: In this clip, Montejano discusses various high school experiences, including the effects of English-only policies, high school walk-outs, and her brief experience attending public school

citation: "High School Experiences," from Diana Montejano Oral History Interview with Steve Arionus and Vinicio Sinta,  June 29, 2016, San Antonio, Civil Rights in Black and Brown Interview Database, https://crbb.tcu.edu/clips/4212/high-school-experiences-3, accessed May 08, 2026.
label: High School Experiences
